languages.text: {n}Калека лишь чуть вздрагивает от укола, но начинает дышать чуть ровнее. В его зрачках, подернутых масляной пленкой, появляется слабая тень благодарности.{/n}
{n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Калека лишь чуть вздрагивает от укола, но начинает дышать чуть ровнее. В его зрачках, подернутых масляной пленкой, появляется слабая тень благодарности.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The cripple flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. A faint ghost of gratitude shines in his eyes, clouded by an oily film.{/n}
{n}The cripple flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. A faint ghost of gratitude shines in his eyes, clouded by an oily film.{/n}
{n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}
{n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El hombre tullido solo se encoge por un momento frente a la inyección, pero su respiración empieza a estabilizarse. A pesar de la película aceitosa que nubla sus ojos, la leve sombra de la gratitud se hace visible en ellos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El hombre tullido solo se encoge por un momento frente a la inyección, pero su respiración empieza a estabilizarse. A pesar de la película aceitosa que nubla sus ojos, la leve sombra de la gratitud se hace visible en ellos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}针头注入时，那残缺不全的男人只是轻轻颤抖了一下。但他的呼吸开始变得平稳。尽管双眼蒙着浑浊的油膜，但一丝微弱的感激之光，还是透了出来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}针头注入时，那残缺不全的男人只是轻轻颤抖了一下。但他的呼吸开始变得平稳。尽管双眼蒙着浑浊的油膜，但一丝微弱的感激之光，还是透了出来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der verstümmelte Mann zuckt angesichts der Injektion kurz, ehe sich seine Atmung spürbar verlangsamt. Trotz des öligen Films auf seinen Augen erkennst du in ihnen einen Hauch von Dankbarkeit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der verstümmelte Mann zuckt angesichts der Injektion kurz, ehe sich seine Atmung spürbar verlangsamt. Trotz des öligen Films auf seinen Augen erkennst du in ihnen einen Hauch von Dankbarkeit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'injection arrache un léger mouvement de recul à l'homme estropié, mais sa respiration commence aussitôt à se stabiliser. Malgré le voile huileux qui recouvre ses yeux, l'ombre de la gratitude transparaît dans son regard.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'injection arrache un léger mouvement de recul à l'homme estropié, mais sa respiration commence aussitôt à se stabiliser. Malgré le voile huileux qui recouvre ses yeux, l'ombre de la gratitude transparaît dans son regard.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sakatlanmış adam, enjeksiyonla hafifçe irkilse de nefes alışverişi düzelmeye başlıyor. Gözlerini bulandıran yağlı tabakaya rağmen minnettarlığın soluk hayaleti parlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sakatlanmış adam, enjeksiyonla hafifçe irkilse de nefes alışverişi düzelmeye başlıyor. Gözlerini bulandıran yağlı tabakaya rağmen minnettarlığın soluk hayaleti parlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}傷ついた男は注射の痛みでわずかに身震いするが、呼吸は落ち着いてきた。油膜で覆われた彼の目は曇っているが、わずかな感謝の光が透けて見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}
